allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const q=JSON.parse\(d\); const urls=[]; \(q.phaseScripts||[]\).forEach\(p=>\(p.scripts||[]\).forEach\(s=>urls.push\(s.script\)\)\); console.log\(urls.join\('\\n'\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/null','utf8'\)||''; process.stdin.resume\(\); let raw=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>raw+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const j=JSON.parse\(raw\); const choices=j.script.filter\(s=>s.choices\); console.log\('Total steps:', j.script.length\); console.log\('Choice steps:', choices.length\); if\(choices[0]\) console.log\('First choice:', JSON.stringify\(choices[0]\).slice\(0,200\)\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('Steps:',j.script.length\); const ch=j.script.filter\(s=>s.choices\); console.log\('Choices:',ch.length\); if\(ch[0]\)console.log\(JSON.stringify\(ch[0]\).slice\(0,300\)\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const j=JSON.parse\(d\); const ch=j.script.filter\(s=>s.choices\); console.log\('Choices:',ch.length\); if\(ch[0]\)console.log\(JSON.stringify\(ch[0]\).slice\(0,400\)\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const j=JSON.parse\(d\); const ch=j.script.filter\(s=>s.choices\); const withSteps=ch.filter\(c=>c.choices.some\(x=>x.steps.length>0\)\); console.log\('Choices with branches:',withSteps.length\); if\(withSteps[0]\)console.log\(JSON.stringify\(withSteps[0]\).slice\(0,500\)\); }\);")
Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const w=JSON.parse\(d\); w.slice\(0,20\).forEach\(x=>console.log\(x.id, x.longName\)\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const w=JSON.parse\(d\); w.filter\(x=>x.id>=303\).forEach\(x=>console.log\(x.id, x.longName.replace\(/\\n/g,' '\)\)\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const j=JSON.parse\(d\); const h=j.script.filter\(s=>s.hideChar\); console.log\('hideChar steps:', h.length\); console.log\('idx in script:', j.script.map\(\(s,i\)=>s.hideChar?i:null\).filter\(x=>x!==null\)\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const j=JSON.parse\(d\); const idx=20; console.log\('step',idx,JSON.stringify\(j.script[idx]\)\); console.log\('step',idx+1,JSON.stringify\(j.script[idx+1]\)\); console.log\('step',idx+2,JSON.stringify\(j.script[idx+2]\)\); console.log\('step',idx+3,JSON.stringify\(j.script[idx+3]\)\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const j=JSON.parse\(d\); j.script.forEach\(\(s,i\)=>{ if\(s.talk && s.talk.detail.includes\('This is'\)\) console.log\('idx',i,JSON.stringify\(s\).slice\(0,150\)\); }\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const j=JSON.parse\(d\); j.script.forEach\(\(s,i\)=>{ if\(s.talk && s.talk.speakerName==='Dr. Roman'\) console.log\('idx',i,'figure:',!!s.figure, s.talk.detail.slice\(0,50\)\); }\); }\);")
